## What plugin do you want?

`polymath-<name>` — one role / lifecycle stage / language / target.

## What problem does it solve?

Quote a real user pain or workflow gap.

## Components

- Skills:
- Commands:
- Agents:
- Hooks:

## Tier

Which tier (0–9) does this fit?

## Token budget

Rough estimate of always-on listing cost. Keep ≤ 400 tokens.

## Related work

Prior art, references, frameworks.
